---
title: "Rachel Harriette Busk"
---

## Rachel Harriette Busk

**Dates:** (1831-1907)

### Description

contributor of <i>MP</i> (1868-71)

### Biography

She was a journalist and folklorist, serving as Rome correspondent of the <i>Westminster Gazette</i>.  She followed Manning in converting to Roman Catholicism in 1858. Her sister Julia Byrne was also a contributor to <i>MP</i>. [ODNB]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
